name: 豪門病房對峙
name_en: Hospital Room Confrontation in Wealthy Family
description: 醫院場景集合了生死危機、家族利益博弈、情感考驗多重張力。車禍後的病房成為各方勢力角力的戰場——婆婆衡量利益、童黛趁虛而入、女主以退為進。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Multiple fractures all over his body. He might never be able to stand again... A year or so. That long. If he can walk in a year, I'll take his last name... Tong Dai really came. Wang, does it hurt?
examples.context: 醫院場景集合了生死危機、家族利益博弈、情感考驗多重張力。車禍後的病房成為各方勢力角力的戰場——婆婆衡量利益、童黛趁虛而入、女主以退為進。
